allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Get-Command java -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('JAVA_HOME', 'Machine'\); [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\('JAVA_HOME', 'User'\); ls 'C:\\Program Files\\Java' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls 'C:\\Program Files\\Eclipse Adoptium' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; ls 'C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft' | Where Name -match 'jdk' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue")
